---
title: "My Assignments"
---

Here you can explore my coursework for EMU660.

::::: assignment-container
::: assignment-card
<h2>Assignment 1</h2>

<a href="assignments/assignment-1.html" class="btn-custom">View Assignment</a>
:::

::: assignment-card
<h2>Assignment 2</h2>

<a href="assignments/assignment-2.html" class="btn-custom">View Assignment</a>
:::
:::::
